name: Mandarin Orange Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 can Mandarin Orange slices - with juice
1 large Can crushed pineapple - with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the cake mix, oil, eggs, and Mandarin Orange slices and juice.
2. Make 3 layers in a greased baking pan.
3. Bake at 375 degrees for 25 minutes.
4. Filling: Beat the filling by hand and spread between layers, top, and sides of the cake.
5. Keep refrigerated.
